channel.title: Pages on Robin Su
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Robin Su

item.title: About
item.description:
Hey, I’m Robin 👋

Builder, Photographer, and Lifelong tinkerer.

Live fully. Stay true.

I thrive on turning ideas into reality and solving problems that matter. Life’s too short to play it safe — if there’s a better way, I’ll find it or build it. I want to make every moment count and stay honest to what I believe in — my ideas, my craft, and my curiosity.

I work at the intersection of cloud and AI — designing architectures that scale, shipping products that solve real problems, and making complex technology feel simple.

Currently a Senior Solutions Engineer at Microsoft. Previously at AWS, where I served ISV and SMB clients as Solutions Architect — helping them migrate workloads, launch AI products, and optimize cloud spend. Before that, I spent years at IBM as Technical Solutions Architect at the Client Center and Innovation Studio, building demo platforms, leading PoC projects, and exploring new technologies to deliver business value.

I’m driven by curiosity and conviction. Whether it’s a serverless architecture, an open source tool, or a perfectly composed photograph — I believe the details matter. I write about what I learn on this blog, share code on GitHub, and shoot street photography on Instagram.

Explore

📝 Blog — Architecture patterns, AI/ML deep dives, and lessons from the field.

🛠 Projects — Open source tools and solutions I’ve built.

📷 Photography — Street, travel, architecture.

Connect

  • GitHub
  • LinkedIn
  • Instagram
  • Email

item.title: Projects
item.description:
AWS Solutions

China CloudFront SSL Plugin V2

One-stop free SSL certificate management for China region CloudFront. V2 brings multi-project management, GUI interface, and Access Key authentication.

🔗 GitHub | Blog Post

Tags: AWS, CloudFront, SSL, Serverless

China CloudFront SSL Plugin

Free SSL certificate deployment plugin for China region CloudFront (V1). Solves the lack of free SSL certificate provisioning and auto-renewal.

🔗 GitHub | Blog Post

Tags: AWS, CloudFront, SSL

Deploy GGUF Model to SageMaker

Deploy quantized GGUF models on SageMaker using llama.cpp for efficient LLM inference.

🔗 GitHub | Blog Post

Tags: AWS, SageMaker, LLM, GGUF
